_note: Synthetic recorded output for --dry-run: a model that gets the salient codes but blurs the financial-strain vs material-hardship adjacency (codes the textbook line as Financial strain rather than Material hardship). ~P 0.83 / R 0.83. Replace via --live for a real number.

codings.codedText: Nobody in my family had been to university
I was working twenty hours a week just to cover rent and food
which left almost nothing for textbooks
I felt like I didn't really belong here
One lecturer noticed I was struggling and started checking in on me
There were a couple of terms where I genuinely thought about dropping out
